page.name: OPEN FORMAT FX
page.pad5: effect_stems ? ( effect_stems 'vocal' ? effect_stems 'vocal' off : effect_stems 'vocal' on ) : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & effect_stems 'vocal' off
page.pad6: effect_stems ? ( effect_stems 'instru' ? effect_stems 'instru' off : effect_stems 'instru' on ) : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & effect_stems 'instru' off
page.pad7: effect_stems ? ( effect_stems 'bass' ? effect_stems 'bass' off : effect_stems 'bass' on ) : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & effect_stems 'bass' off
page.pad8: effect_stems ? ( effect_stems 'rhythm' ? effect_stems 'rhythm' off : effect_stems 'rhythm' on ) : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' off
page.pad9: effect_stems ? padfx 'Flippin Double' 'stemfx:stems' smart_pressed : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & padfx 'Flippin Double' 'stemfx:stems' smart_pressed
page.pad10: effect_stems ? padfx 'Choppa' 72% 1bt 0% 'Quantize:on' 'stemfx:stems' smart_pressed : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & padfx 'Choppa' 72% 1bt 0% 'Quantize:on' 'stemfx:stems' smart_pressed
page.pad13: effect_stems ? padfx_single 'Echo Out' 82% 1bt 'stemfx:stems' : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & padfx_single 'Echo Out' 82% 1bt 'stemfx:stems'
page.pad14: effect_stems ? padfx_single 'Loop Out' 1bt 70% 50% 'Stop:on' 'Slip:on' 'stemfx:stems' : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & padfx_single 'Loop Out' 1bt 70% 50% 'Stop:on' 'Slip:on' 'stemfx:stems'
page.pad15: effect_stems ? padfx_single 'Stutter Out' 60% 25% 25% 'Quantize:on' 'stemfx:stems' : effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'instru' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & padfx_single 'Stutter Out' 60% 25% 25% 'Quantize:on' 'stemfx:stems'
page.pad16: mute_stem 'vocal' off & mute_stem 'instru' off & mute_stem 'bass' off & mute_stem 'kick' off & mute_stem 'hihat' off & effect_disable_all & effect_active 'colorfx' off & effect_stems off & effect_stems 'vocal' on & effect_stems 'melody' on & effect_stems 'bass' on & effect_stems 'rhythm' on & filter 50%
